name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive funds internationally and domestically with competitive exchange rates and low fees.
description_long:
Western Union is an established money transfer company that operates a worldwide network for sending and receiving money across borders. The company has built its reputation on providing accessible financial services to customers who need to move funds internationally and domestically. Western Union's primary focus is facilitating money transfers rather than traditional financial products like loans or credit services.

Western Union offers international money transfer services with features including competitive exchange rates, promotional fee structures, and multi-currency support. Customers can send money online from the United States to over 200 countries and territories, with the ability to register for better exchange rates and reduced fees on first transfers. The platform supports transfers to major currencies including MXN (Mexico), GTQ (Guatemala), PHP (Philippines), INR (India), and many others, demonstrating extensive global coverage.

Western Union distinguishes itself through its broad geographic reach and transparent pricing structure. The website clearly displays fee ranges (from $1.99 to $0.00 USD) and real-time exchange rates, allowing customers to see exact amounts receivers will obtain before confirming transfers. The company offers promotional incentives such as waived fees for new customers on their first international transfer, making initial transactions more attractive.

However, potential users should note that Western Union's core service is money transfer rather than comprehensive financial services. While the platform provides essential remittance functionality, customers seeking broader banking services, credit products, or account management features will need to look elsewhere. The service is best suited for individuals specifically needing to send funds internationally or domestically rather than those seeking integrated financial solutions.
pros: Supports transfers to over 200 countries and territories with extensive currency options
Transparent fee structure with rates clearly displayed before transaction completion
New customer promotion offers $0 fee on first online international transfer
Real-time exchange rate visibility allows customers to see exact amounts receivers will get
Online registration enables better exchange rates compared to non-registered transfers
Flexible fee structure ranging from $1.99 to $0.00 USD depending on transfer method
Accessible platform for domestic and international money transfers from the United States
cons: Limited to money transfer services only; does not offer banking, lending, or credit products
Exchange rates displayed are variable ranges rather than fixed rates, creating uncertainty about final cost
No information provided about transfer speed, delivery methods, or pickup locations on the reviewed page
Website content does not address customer support, dispute resolution, or fraud protection policies
Mobile wallet option (Orange wallet) was shown as temporarily unavailable during review
best_for: International remittance senders supporting family or business contacts in other countries
Individuals needing to move funds between the United States and major destination countries
New customers qualifying for promotional zero-fee transfers on first transactions
People seeking transparent, real-time exchange rates before committing to a transfer
diagnosis: Western Union is best for individuals specifically needing to send money internationally or domestically with transparent rates and competitive pricing. The main caveat is that this is a money transfer service only—it does not offer banking accounts, loans, credit building, or broader financial services, so users seeking comprehensive financial products need alternative providers.
services: Online international money transfers from the United States
Money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Multi-currency support including MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, DOP, JMD, and 150+ others
Customer registration for improved exchange rates
Promotional fee waiver on first online international transfer
Real-time exchange rate quotes and calculation tools
Domestic money transfers within the United States
Variable fee structure with transparent pricing display
Receiver notification and fund delivery functionality
